docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY MORA RIVERA, MIRIAM AS TO DEFENDANT PANDIT, SARIKA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MORA RIVERA, MIRIAM ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF MIRIAM MORA RIVERA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SARIKA PANDIT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF STATED THAT DEFENDANT'S INSURANCE COMPANY PAID FOR DAMAGES TO THE PLAINTIFF'S VEHICLE. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
ORDER FOR DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED.
